arts.ttl: Meet the real Arne Slot: LEWIS STEELE reveals how flying Dutchman fell in love with Liverpool, what's changed from Jurgen Klopp era and his surprising matchday superstition
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: There are two scenes which perfectly paint the picture of how Arne Slot is slowly falling in love with Liverpool and how the Kop has grown to adore this low-key, smooth operator.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Leicester - Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for their Premier League clash with Leicester on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer state of play as priority becomes clear amid doubts over striker link
arts.sum: While van Nistelrooy has publicly said that he’s more than content with his current four centre-back options, the heart of the defence is expected to be a focus for City next month. City are only permitted to have two players on loan from fellow Premier League clubs at any one time, so it feels like a waste of one of those spots if the man filling it can’t even make the bench.

arts.ttl: Seventeen players you forgot captained Liverpool
arts.sum: After Wataru Endo captained Liverpool in the second half against Southampton last week, a look back at some of the Reds you forgot wore the armband in years gone by

arts.ttl: Club have made ‘exploratory survey’ for Liverpool man – Loan move can help reignite player
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Federico Chiesa has had a frustrating time at the club since his arrival in the summer transfer window. While the Italian returned to action in the Carabao Cup game against Southampton last week, he was not in the squad for Liverpool’s 6-3 win over Tottenham at the weekend. arts.ttl: 'I'm a Liverpool legend - but it's a Man Utd player who I think could become league's best'
arts.sum: Didi Hamann has explained that a Manchester United star is on his way to becoming one of the Premier League's best players, despite a long-time rivalry between the Red Devils and his former club, Liverpool

arts.ttl: Atalanta interested in Liverpool’s Federico Chiesa
arts.sum: Serie A leaders Atalanta are set to bid for Liverpool’s Federico Chiesa. According to a report by L’Eco di Bergamo via Tutto Atalanta, Atalanta are expected to send a loan offer…

arts.ttl: Liverpool star claims Aston Villa player ‘can be the best’ – Tells Villans man to ‘put mind to it’
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Luis Díaz has heaped praise on Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán during an interview with ESPN’s Sportscenter. The Liverpool star and the Aston Villa striker have played together for Colombia and the 27-year-old knows Durán well from their time with the national team.
